name: reclaim-evicted-pods
problem: Pods evicted under ephemeral-storage pressure pile up as Failed and clutter the namespace.

name: reload-squid-config
problem: Squid's config drifted from declared; a reload applies it without a full restart.

name: reboot-hung-gateway
problem: The Akeyless gateway hangs (stops routing, memory climbs). A reboot clears it; investigate after.
